Drop three transparent PNGs into this directory and Xcode will pick them up.

Files expected (filenames must match exactly):
  - BrandLogo.png      —  ~240 × 60   @ 1x
  - BrandLogo@2x.png   —  ~480 × 120  @ 2x
  - BrandLogo@3x.png   —  ~720 × 180  @ 3x

Source artwork should be:
  - Full-color, brand-tinted logo as designed
  - Transparent background (no white halo)
  - sRGB, 8-bit-per-channel PNG
  - No DPI metadata that contradicts the @nx scale

Once the PNGs are in place this marker can be deleted; the asset catalog
already references the three filenames in Contents.json.
